title: Katakuri Forces Luffy Past His Limit
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Chiffon, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Pudding as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Should we just wait until we get to cacao Island?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: By the way, Brother Peros!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The cake is on its way here! Pudding's bringing it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! are you serious! That's a true godsend!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that's just the thing, brother! Pudding really is the one bringing it,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But the ship the cake is on

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: belongs to Bege!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Pero- Rin?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why in the world would one of the Assassins be in possession of that cake?! That thing'll help save this kingdom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I don't know...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do we do?! Now there's no way

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We can trust that cake!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: bege's ship

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You gotta be kidding!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WAAA AGH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There's no way... HAA.. HAA...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll let you do some- thin' like that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big Mom's gonna eat this cake for sure, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What kind of idiot wouldn't put poison or explosives in it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll be able to take out one of the yonkou!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you have any idea what sort of chance this is?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut it! My pride as a cook is riding on this match!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit your stupid plots! We'll beat our enemy with taste alone!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! this ain't the time for Dreamin', boy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big Mom's Eaten Basically every sweet and snack under the sun!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you think you can make a cake beyond her imaginations?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's just what I want to do!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah! Because I have to! Or we're dead!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But even if you manage to succeed, she won't just let us live!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess you just don't know the kind of person big mom once was!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's been many times that she regretted not doing away with someone when she had the cha-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I am not sure if

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: GYAAAH! >

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Father!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Father!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The hell did you do to father, you bastard?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Black, leg!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell did you make father eat?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ask him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's so delicious I could die! This cream... (1)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The delicious- mess almost killed him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look, bege. You can assimilate her if you want.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that's only after I've filled her belly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Someone needs to

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I feed those who want to be fed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's a cook's job!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Lady pudding?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What happened to you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: bege! It's been a while since I've used my own skills, too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: believe! In the power of sweets!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn and blast! It feels like I've been hypno- Tized!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But what is this joyous feeling spreading through my mouth?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We've gotta hurry! Is the napper finished?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Just a bit more!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lady Chiffon! We've lost two cooks to the sweet aroma!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Tell them to keep it together!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I hope you're safe,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Nami! I'm coming for you!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 58 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
